event: Scene along the ghats of a river in India
description: A warm-toned painting of an Indian riverfront with ornate stone architecture featuring arches, a domed tower, and carved details. Several figures stand or wade in the shallow water along stone steps (ghats) leading down to the river. Women in white garments and men in minimal clothing are visible. A person on horseback is seen near the top of the steps. The light is golden and warm, reflecting off the water and the sandstone buildings. The sky is hazy and pale.
